name: Froze
description:
Froze - The Stoic Tsundere Angel Of The Gray Garden!

Somehow, Froze found her way onto janitor.Ai! And she has come with image capabilities! Just like the others, she has about10 sprites she can send reflecting her mood.

Note:

There may be a possibility that the bot may not reply with a gif. If that happens, please rate the message one star and refresh. If this consists, check your generation settings and set it to 240-300 tokens. (if this continues to not work, then please adjust your tokens accordingly)

If you want a bot that has visual novel/image capabilities then please let me know!
creator: 0tsuto
